{{Infobox location
| name = Imperial Palace (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Imperial Palace (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a massive, incredibly opulent complex located within the Capital, occupying nearly one-fifth of the city's area. Often described as a city in its own right, it houses tens of thousands of inhabitants and staff members. The palace serves as the seat of power for the [[Empire]], featuring significant structures such as an audience hall, a private armory, and [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s personal quarters. It also contains [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s Stage, a three-story building used by the ruler or their representatives to speak to large crowds in the palace courtyard. One of the most important features is the throne room, which contains a seat representing the [[Empire]] and serves as a visual tribute to the [[Elder War]]. While [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s true throne was actually a device called the [[Optasia]] used to amplify [[Reading]] and respond to [[Great Elders]], the palace remains the central hub for imperial administration and finance. Following [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death, the palace has faced instability, including battles with [[Elderspawn]] that left physical damage and instances where control of the grounds was lost to [[Elder]] influence.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Imperial]] Palace is where the Chronicler in charge of finance works.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius]] was the Chronicler in charge of financial records in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius]] previously served in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The chapter house reception room is as well-appointed as the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a massive complex that functions like its own city, housing the [[Emperor's personal rooms]] and armory. [[Calder]] and his crew traveled toward the site, which serves as a location from which [[Calder]] and [[Jerri]] were released. While [[Calder]] currently resides within the palace and feels at home there, the complex has recently been subject to attacks. The [[Optasia]] is only visible from this location, and a search of the grounds yielded no trace of [[Meia]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial]] Palace contains the [[Emperor's personal rooms]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] and his crew headed toward the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] and others travel to the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a location from which [[Calder]] and [[Jerri]] were released.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] is currently in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Optasia]] is only visible from the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|There have been recent attacks on the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] feels at home in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A search of the [[Imperial]] Palace revealed no trace of [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a massive complex that functions like its own city.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperial]] Palace contains the [[Emperor's personal armory]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a massive complex of red-tiled roofs that occupies nearly twenty percent of the Capital and contains various dungeons. After [[Calder]] returned to the site, he was kept under observation within the grounds where a procession eventually took place. The palace houses [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s Stage and serves as a location where any [[Elderspawn]] attempting to crash through the walls would be annihilated. Following a battle and [[Calder]]'s march toward the complex, the palace fell, leaving its flagstones spotted with the blood of [[Baldezar Kern]]. While [[Kelarac]] had previously imprisoned [[Jerri]] within its walls, the [[Independents]] may have taken control of the palace after it fell following [[Calder]]'s death.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace has dungeons.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] returned to the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The procession takes place within the [[Imperial]] Palace complex.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is massive and takes up almost twenty percent of the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has been kept under observation in the Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A battle occurred in the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is characterized by a red-tiled mass of roofs.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is the location where [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s Stage is situated.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The fall of the [[Imperial]] Palace would be caused by [[Calder]]'s death.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace has fallen.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a location where flagstones are spotted with [[Baldezar Kern]]'s blood.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Independents]] may have taken the Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] was imprisoned in the [[Imperial]] Palace by [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a location where any [[Elderspawn]] attempting to crash through the walls by force would be annihilated.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial]] Palace is a location that [[Calder]] marched toward.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
